name: SkinGuide MCP
description: Search skincare products by Baumann skin type, product category, and budget. Find the perfect products for your skin type among 16 different skin type profiles.

tools.name: search_products
tools.description:
Search skincare products by type, skin type, brand, budget, keyword, and ingredient. Results are sorted by rating (best-rated first). Returns products with name, brand, price, link, image, and compatible skin types. The response also includes available_without_ingredient_filter when the ingredient filter is used.

IMPORTANT USAGE NOTES:
- If total=0, the filters were too narrow — retry with fewer filters (remove ingredient, remove budget, etc.).
- 'ingredient' requires an exact text match in the stored ingredient list. Many products have incomplete ingredient data, so ingredient searches often return 0. If ingredient returns 0, retry using keyword=<ingredient_name> instead (e.g. keyword="vitamin e").
- 'skinType' must be a 4-letter Baumann code such as OSPT, DSPW, ORNW — NOT natural language like "sensitive" or "oily skin".
- 'keyword' searches product names and tags and is a reliable fallback for ingredient concepts.
- When total=0 with an ingredient filter, check available_without_ingredient_filter to see how many products matched the other filters — if > 0, retry with keyword instead of ingredient.

brand.description: Filter by brand name (partial match, case-insensitive). E.g., 'CeraVe', 'La Roche', 'Neutrogena'.

skinType.description: 4-letter Baumann skin type code — must be one of: ORNT, ORNW, ORPT, ORPW, OSNT, OSNW, OSPT, OSPW, DRNT, DRNW, DRPT, DRPW, DSNT, DSNW, DSPT, DSPW. Do NOT use natural language like "sensitive" or "oily".

od.description: Skin oiliness: 'O' for Oily, 'D' for Dry

sr.description: Skin sensitivity: 'S' for Sensitive, 'R' for Resistant

pn.description: Skin pigmentation: 'P' for Pigmented (prone to dark spots), 'N' for Non-pigmented

wt.description: Skin aging: 'W' for Wrinkled (shows aging), 'T' for Tight (firm)

budget.description: Maximum price in dollars. Use 5, 10, 20, 50, or 100. Use 101 for products over $100.

keyword.description: Search keyword matched against product name and tags (case-insensitive). Use this as a fallback when ingredient returns 0 results. E.g., 'vitamin e', 'retinol', 'acne', 'anti-aging'.

ingredient.description: Filter by ingredient name — requires exact text match in the product's ingredient list. Many products have incomplete ingredient data. If this returns 0, check available_without_ingredient_filter and retry with keyword=<ingredient_name> instead.

limit.description: Maximum number of products to return. Defaults to 50.

tools.name: get_skin_type_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific Baumann skin type (e.g., ORPW, DSNT). Returns the title, full name, short description, long description, characteristics, and routine description.

tools.name: list_skin_types
tools.description: List all 16 Baumann skin types with their titles, names, short descriptions, and long descriptions. Useful for understanding the skin type classification system.

tools.name: get_routine
tools.description: Get the skincare routine steps for a specific Baumann skin type. Returns step-by-step instructions including product type, action, and time of day (AM/PM). Can filter by gender and time of day.

gender.description: Filter by gender: 'male' or 'female'. Omit for all.

timeOfDay.description: Filter by time of day: 'AM' for morning, 'PM' for evening. Omit for all.

tools.name: get_brands
tools.description: Get a list of all available skincare brands in the SkinGuide product catalog.

tools.name: get_product_types
tools.description: Get a list of all available product categories in the SkinGuide database.

tools.name: get_test_questions
tools.description: Get all skin type test questions for first-time users. Returns questions grouped by skin dimension (O_D, S_R, P_N, W_T) with answer options and scores. Use this to guide users through the Baumann skin type assessment.

tools.name: submit_test_answers
tools.description: Submit answers for the Baumann skin type test and compute the final 4-letter skin type code (e.g. DSNT, ORPW). Requires authentication: pass the Firebase ID token in the Authorization header as 'Bearer <token>'. Saves the result to the user's profile. Returns the skin type code, a score breakdown per dimension, and optional flags for acne and dark spots.

answers.description: Array of answers, one per question. Each entry contains the questionId (string index) and the selected score value (number).

questionId.description: The question identifier returned by get_test_questions (zero-based index as string, e.g. '0', '1', '2').

value.description: The numeric score of the chosen answer option.

tools.name: get_product_ingredients
tools.description: Get the full ingredient list for a specific product, enriched with details from the ingredient catalog (description, comedogenicity, irritancy, what it does). Use the product_id returned by search_products.

product_id.description: The product ID as returned by search_products.

tools.name: get_ingredient_info
tools.description: Look up detailed information about a cosmetic/skincare ingredient from the ingredient catalog. Returns description, comedogenicity rating, irritancy rating, what it does, and expert take. Pass either the slug (kebab-case) or the ingredient name as it appears on product labels.

name.description: The ingredient name as it appears on product labels, e.g. "Niacinamide" or "Hyaluronic Acid".
